not_deployed_to: .opencode/ (scripts/sync-assets.js excludes this directory by default; defensive check added in Cycle 0)

forbidden_patterns.description: Residual L0-L3 hierarchy in hm- lineage
forbidden_patterns.reason: Residual L0-L3 hierarchy — replaced by 22 domain prefixes

forbidden_patterns.description: Residual L0-L3 hierarchy in hf- lineage
Embedded l0/l1/l2/l3 substring in any artifact name
forbidden_patterns.reason: Even embedded l0/l1/l2/l3 substrings are banned (e.g., a hypothetical hm-research-l0-detective is still forbidden)

forbidden_patterns.description: gsd- prefix in shipped asset (developer-tooling only)
forbidden_patterns.reason: GSD is developer tooling, lives in .opencode/get-shit-done/, not in shipped assets

forbidden_patterns.description: gate- prefix in shipped skills (dev-tooling only)
forbidden_patterns.reason: gate-* is dev-tooling only; replaced by hm-gate-* in shipped surface

forbidden_patterns.description: stack- prefix in shipped skills (dev-tooling only)
forbidden_patterns.reason: stack-* is dev-tooling only; replaced by hm-stack-authoring in shipped surface

forbidden_patterns.description: Hardcoded tech stack/framework in shipped skill name
forbidden_patterns.forbidden_by: 04-03 ADR §2.2 F7; master plan §9 (tech-agnostic + stack-agnostic principle)
forbidden_patterns.reason: Tech-agnostic + stack-agnostic: references may use these tokens, but never shipped skills

forbidden_patterns.description: Show-don't-tell: SKILL.md body must name at least one Hivemind custom tool (validator checks SKILL.md body, not the name)
forbidden_patterns.reason: Show-don't-tell rule: SKILL.md must name at least one Hivemind custom tool or OpenCode runtime primitive
forbidden_patterns.implementation_note: Body scan, not name regex. Shell validator reports this pattern as 'requires body scan (see 04-04 §3.2 validator script).'

forbidden_patterns.description: gsd- reference in SKILL.md body (must be in '## GSD Compatibility' section only)
forbidden_patterns.reason: All gsd-* references in SKILL.md body must be replaced with hm-* canonical; the ## GSD Compatibility section is the only allowed gsd-* surface
forbidden_patterns.implementation_note: Body scan with section whitelist. Shell validator reports this pattern as 'requires body scan'.

forbidden_patterns.description: SKILL.md body line count check (>50001 chars or 500+ lines target)
forbidden_patterns.reason: Progressive disclosure: SKILL.md should be <500 lines ideal, <300 target. Use Pattern 2/3 references for larger content.
forbidden_patterns.implementation_note: Line count check on SKILL.md body, not name regex. Shell validator documents this rule but does not enforce from name input.

forbidden_patterns.description: 5-realm coverage gate (spec, test, doc, arch, clean-code) — sentinel string for gate-orchestrator verdict
forbidden_patterns.reason: 5-realm gate is non-negotiable; if any realm is unsatisfied, the cycle fails
forbidden_patterns.implementation_note: Not a regex; this is a gate-orchestrator verdict. Shell validator documents this rule only.

forbidden_patterns.description: Preventive: no l4+ hierarchy (defense against future hierarchy reinflation)
forbidden_patterns.reason: No l4+ exists today; rule is preventive against future hierarchy reinflation

allowed_prefixes.domain: Documentation, references, templates (reserved, no anchor skill today)
Engine contracts, state, integrations, OMO reference
Tech-agnostic quality gate triad (replaces shipped gate-*)
Help users author own stack-* post-install (replaces shipped stack-*)
External third-party tech-stack validation, ingestion, context compliance

additional_allowed_lineages.policy: FLEXIBLE (hf-* lineage; only F01-F03, F12 forbidden rules apply)

framework-agnostic whitelist (10 skills: completion-detection, cross-cutting-change-mgmt, iterative-loop, marketing-market-research, opencode-config-workflow, quality-gate-orchestration, session-foundation, subagent-delegation-patterns, user-intent-patterns, wave-execution)

skill.must_have_prefix: one of allowed_prefixes, hf-, hivemind-, or unprefixed_whitelist

real_codebase_audit_2026_06_07.note: Cycle 0 surfaces violations; migration is a separate phase (post-AUDIT-04)

agent.must_have_prefix: one of allowed_prefixes, hf-, or hivemind-

command.must_have_prefix: one of allowed_prefixes, hf-, hivemind-, or unprefixed framework-agnostic

exit_code_semantics.0: PASS — name satisfies all schema + forbidden-pattern + required-prefix checks
exit_code_semantics.1: FAIL — name matches one of the 12 forbidden patterns (F01-F12, name-applicable subset)
exit_code_semantics.2: FAIL — schema validation (not kebab-case, too long, leading/trailing hyphen, etc.)
exit_code_semantics.3: FAIL — in-scope asset type missing required prefix (e.g., a 'skill' in routing domain without hm-routing- prefix)
